'''chakafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilpalm|oilpalm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilpalm|oilpalm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chakafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækæfæth|chækæfæth]] || [[word:chækæfæj|chækæfæj]] || [[word:chækæfæsh|chækæfæsh]] || [[word:chækæfæ|chækæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakakafath|chakakafath]] || [[word:chakakafaj|chakakafaj]] || [[word:chakakafash|chakakafash]] || [[word:chakakafa|chakakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakafath|chakafath]] || [[word:chakafaj|chakafaj]] || [[word:chakafash|chakafash]] || [[word:chakafa|chakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakaffath|chakaffath]] || [[word:chakaffaj|chakaffaj]] || [[word:chakaffash|chakaffash]] || [[word:chakaffaf|chakaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakafatha|chakafatha]] || [[word:chakafaja|chakafaja]] || [[word:chakafasha|chakafasha]] || [[word:chakafaka|chakafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakafath|chakafath]] || [[word:chakafaj|chakafaj]] || [[word:chakafash|chakafash]] || [[word:chakafa|chakafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakafathal|chakafathal]] || [[word:chakafajal|chakafajal]] || [[word:chakafashal|chakafashal]] || [[word:chakafakal|chakafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakafathatha|chakafathatha]] || [[word:chakafajaja|chakafajaja]] || [[word:chakafashasha|chakafashasha]] || [[word:chakafaka|chakafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakafathan|chakafathan]] || [[word:chakafajan|chakafajan]] || [[word:chakafashan|chakafashan]] || [[word:chakafakan|chakafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakafathaoro|chakafathaoro]] || [[word:chakafajaoro|chakafajaoro]] || [[word:chakafashaoro|chakafashaoro]] || [[word:chakafakaoro|chakafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
